title: Runeterracraft
description: New mobs to tame and fight! Armors and Weapons to dash around the battlefield and blow things up and more! based of Runeterra
body:
![Runeterracraft Logo for Arcane update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edfb63f02815de88ea3b4ac74d0c79571cab05d4.png)
# **The world of Runeterra in Minecraft!**
This mod dives into the world of Runeterra and will aim to add aspects of it into Minecraft through this mod. This mod is heavily inspired from games such as League of Legends and Legends of Runeterra, along with the Netflix series Arcane. The mod will expand from Piltover & Zaun to the icy mountains of Freljord and eventually the magic-ridden kingdom of Demacia. The inspirations for this won't be limited to Arcane and Legends of Runeterra(LoR), other Riot Forge games such as Ruined King and Song of Nunu will be considered in making the mod. 

This is my first mod and I'm still learning the ropes of making a mod so please do give feedback as it will be incredibly helpful. This mod was made to share my love and passion for the world of Runeterra in Minecraft.

We will kickoff the start of the mod by adapting the recent series Arcane from Netflix but will not be limited to this scope. There will be mobs and items from Arcane, some from LoR and others from League.
## Into the Arcane:
![Poro and Murk Wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8488bda8079852328a54a8c9d113f39335d23ae0.png)
![Hextech Tools and Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5980212392bfec80e4d7ed460cf812d0c529f9ba.png)
![Chemtech Tools and Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68ad019e25df93e1bb82c3e1fc449c12c37bba53.png)
- **Ores**: Introducing the Hex Ore! the highly volatile ore that can be used to create or destroy
- **Blocks**: Enjoy new sets of building blocks to build from Hextech bricks to Chemtech bricks
- **Tools**: The power of Hextech and Chemtech tools is in your hands
- **Weapons**: Dash around and punch mobs in the face with the Atlas Gauntlet or maybe blow everything up with Fishbones!
- **Crops/Foods**: Get some tasty honeyfruit seeds from Mangrove roots to feed the scuttle crab or try out a scuttle crab!
- **Enchantments**: Deal poison damage with the Corrosion Enchant or leech your enemies' hp with the Omnivamp enchantment
- **Mobs**: Wanna tame a cuddly poro? or maybe a two-headed Murk Wolf? Find the Viktor from S2 Act 2 Arcane and his evolved people!
- **Boss Fights**: Face off against the wrath of Zaun or fight against the herald of the arcane 

### **Why is "insert character here" not included?**
The mod will not include everything from a region or series (Mel, Jayce and Singed being absent in the Arcane Update) but will eventually be added. Jayce along with Ekko and Heimerdinger will be added in a future Hextech-themed update. The aim is to go from region to region with a specific theme in mind with the first about Arcane and its Herald Viktor. This themed update will help with adding all the regions of Runeterra quickly and making it relatively small scale.

**The planned roadmap will go: 
_P&Z -> Freljord -> Demacia -> Noxus -> Ionia -> Void -> Shurima -> Bilgewater -> Shadow Isles -> Targon -> Ixtal -> Bandle City -> P&Z_**

How to spawn the two bosses:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Killing untamed Murk Wolf will spawn Warwick
- Killing untamed Viktor will spawn Herald Viktor

</details>
